title: Bharathchandran I.P.S.
desc: Hyder Ali Hassan, a scheming politician, is in league with the underworld and runs a lot of illegal businesses. Balachandran, an IPS officer, is sent on a mission to capture him.

title: Veeram
desc: Two brothers, raised by their sister, take opposite path, one honest, the other criminal. When tragedy strikes and the criminal brother dies, the honest one seeks vengeance.

title: Comali
desc: A long coma leaves Ravi disorientated in an unrecognisable world. However, he sets out on a journey to reclaim his past and adapt to a new reality.

title: Singam II
desc: Durai Singam, a policeman working an undercover operation, attempts to eliminate a drug trafficking ring in the coastal town of Thoothukudi.

title: Jilla
desc: Shakthi, the adopted son of Sivan, is a powerful gangster in Madurai. Although Shakthi bitterly hates the police, he is forced to become a policeman at his father's behest.
